results.question: Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT "Subcategory", COUNT("Order Quantity") AS "order_lines", SUM("Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM("Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM("Sales Amount") / SUM("Order Quantity") AS "revenue_per_unit", AVG("List Price") AS "avg_list_price", SUM("Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", (SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales Amount") * 100 AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales" JOIN "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey" GROUP BY "Subcategory"
